_comment: Pedersen et al. PRL 120, 165501 (2018) — Kob-Andersen binary LJ smoke + small production. N=1000 (800 A + 200 B), ρ=1.2 isochore, T0 ∈ {0.7, 1.0, 1.3} bracketing the paper Tm=1.028(3). Engine has drag-only Langevin (no Wiener noise) and no NPT, so paper coexistence-line method is out of scope; we target qualitative partial RDF structure (g_AB peak < g_AA peak per σ_AB<σ_AA) and qualitative MSD trend at T=1.3 (liquid mobile).
_paper_ref: Pedersen et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 120, 165501 (2018)

campaign.notes: below paper Tm=1.028 — supercooled regime; expect glassy MSD
at paper Tm=1.028 — coexistence point in Fig.1
above paper Tm — equilibrium liquid; expect mobile MSD

aggregation.title: Pedersen KA-LJ campaign — N=1000, ρ=1.2, T={0.7,1.0,1.3}
